reasoning: As of December 21, 2025, there are only 10 days remaining in the year. Given the very short timeframe left and the European holiday season, the likelihood of a completely new, major commitment of rocket artillery systems being announced before December 31 is extremely low. The crowd forecast of 18% ten days ago suggests no such commitment had occurred by mid-December, and the chance of it happening in the final days of the year is marginal.
